title: Dhammika says SL is a ship rocking rapidly
body_lines: Newly sworn in SLPP Parliamentarian Dhammika Perera today said that he had submitted his asset declaration and tax clearance certificate prior to accepting the appointment.

"I’m confident about attracting investors even during a challenging period like this and I also plan to provide employment opportunities for the youth. I don’t think this is a sinking ship but a ship that rocks rapidly. Nobody gets into a sinking ship," Perera told journalists.
